subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-01-11
subcodes.first_line: Today we call on Sheik Ibrahim Akki. As you know his two merchant steamers are sunk by the Russian warship in Beirut harbor.
subcodes.subjects: @conduct in finance and business, @stories; anecdotes, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @composure; tranquillity; serenity
